headline: CVS vs Cigna: Which Healthcare Giant Belongs in Your Retirement Portfolio?
summary: CVS Health (NYSE: CVS) and Cigna Group (NYSE: CI) are both major players in American healthcare. For retirement investors choosing between them, the key question is: do you prefer stability and income at a discount, or stronger earnings quality and capital discipline at an even steeper discount? Valuation Both stocks are cheap by historical healthcare ... CVS vs Cigna: Which Healthcare Giant Belongs in Your Retirement Portfolio?
